svg.text: Conv_Simple / CV-101 (garage conveyor) — 230 V 1φ supply → CB1 → Q1/MLC → VFD1 (GS10) → M1 · branch tap → PS1 (24 VDC control, E-004)
Each tick mark across a run = one conductor (e.g. 2 ticks = 2-wire single-phase; 3 ticks = 3-wire three-phase). Solid = verified,
dashed = FIELD VERIFY, same as every other sheet (see the line-style legend). No per-conductor wire numbers on this sheet — see
wires.yaml `convention` (E-001) for the numbered detail carried on E-003 / E-004.
Summary sheet only — no wire numbers are assigned here (see the wire-numbering key on E-001). For per-conductor evidence and FIELD
VERIFY status, use E-003 (VFD power) and E-004 (24 VDC control power).
• Conductor-count ticks (e.g. 2 ticks = '1φ, 2W') mark circuit conductor count only — not a conduit/cable schedule.
• Supply is 230 V SINGLE-PHASE (2-wire), technician-confirmed 2026-07-11 — this sheet corrects the earlier 3-phase assumption.
• PS1 branch is drawn as a tap off the same incoming supply; the exact AC leg/circuit feeding PS1 is FIELD VERIFY (OI-25).
